# PetCare Malaysia

> Malaysia's trusted directory for 24/7 emergency vets, clinics, grooming, boarding, pet insurance and pet care guides across 169+ Malaysian cities. Trilingual content (English, Bahasa Malaysia, 简体中文).

PetCare Malaysia helps pet owners find verified veterinary clinics, emergency care, and pet services nationwide. The site includes a free Pet Emergency Assessment tool (17-step triage), authority hubs on dog dental, cat dental, dog skin, dog vomiting/diarrhea, and urinary tract diseases, and a centralized Q&A hub answering common pet care questions with Malaysian context (RM costs, local DVS regulations, council bylaws).

## Core Pages

- [Home](/): 24/7 emergency vets, clinics, grooming and pet insurance directory for Malaysia.
- [Vet Clinics Directory](/vet-clinics): Searchable directory of verified veterinary clinics across Malaysia.
- [Pet Emergency Assessment](/pet-emergency-assessment): Free 17-step triage tool that scores your pet's urgency level.
- [Pet Emergency Guide](/pet-emergency-guide): 47-page lead-magnet guide covering red-flag symptoms and first response.
- [Pet Surgery Cost](/pet-surgery-cost): RM cost ranges for common pet surgeries in Malaysia.
- [Q&A Hub](/qa): Centralized pet care Q&A across all 14 Malaysian states.
- [Ask a Question](/ask-pet-question): AI-powered answers (Gemini 2.5 Flash) for pet care questions.
- [Search](/search): Search clinics, services and articles.
- [Blog](/blog): Pet care articles and guides.
- [Services](/services): Grooming, boarding, pet food, adoption and more.

## Authority Hubs

- [Dog Dental Hub](/dog-dental-disease): 93-page authority section on canine dental conditions, costs and treatment options. Also: [MS](/ms/dog-dental-disease) · [ZH](/zh/dog-dental-disease)
- [Cat Dental Hub](/cat-dental-disease): Trilingual guide to feline gingivitis, tooth resorption (FORL), stomatitis, fractures and cleaning costs (RM350–RM3,500). Also: [MS](/ms/cat-dental-disease) · [ZH](/zh/cat-dental-disease)
  - [Gingivitis in Cats](/cat-dental-disease/conditions/gingivitis)
  - [Feline Tooth Resorption (FORL)](/cat-dental-disease/conditions/tooth-resorption)
  - [Feline Stomatitis](/cat-dental-disease/conditions/stomatitis)
  - [Tooth Fractures in Cats](/cat-dental-disease/conditions/tooth-fracture)
  - [Bad Breath in Cats](/cat-dental-disease/symptoms/bad-breath)
  - [Professional Dental Cleaning for Cats](/cat-dental-disease/treatments/dental-cleaning)
  - [Cat Dental Home Care](/cat-dental-disease/prevention/home-care)
  - [Cat Dental Emergency Signs](/cat-dental-disease/emergency-signs)
- [Dog Skin Problems](/dog-skin-problems): Hot spots, allergies, mange and fungal infections in Malaysian humidity. Also: [MS](/ms/dog-skin-problems) · [ZH](/zh/dog-skin-problems)
- [Dog Vomiting & Diarrhea](/dog-vomiting-diarrhea): When to wait vs rush — causes, home-care limits and red-flag symptoms. Also: [MS](/ms/dog-vomiting-diarrhea) · [ZH](/zh/dog-vomiting-diarrhea)
- [Urinary Tract Diseases](/urinary-tract-disease): Species-aware (cat/dog) hub on FLUTD, UTI, stones and kidney disease.
- [Pet Insurance](/pet-insurance): Compare pet insurance providers and coverage in Malaysia.

## Languages

- [Bahasa Malaysia](/ms): Full site in Malay.
- [简体中文](/zh): Full site in Simplified Chinese.

## Cities & States

- [Kuala Lumpur](/kuala-lumpur): Vets and pet services in KL.
- [Selangor](/selangor): Vets and pet services across Selangor (PJ, Shah Alam, Subang, Kajang, etc.).
- [Penang](/penang): Vets and pet services in Penang.
- 169+ Malaysian cities covered — see [sitemap.xml](/sitemap.xml) for the full list.
